description: The Ambre fragrance by Balderssarini for men is classic in its masculine aroma with an excellent blend of smoky apple, whisky, tobacco and lather notes. This fragrance has good longevity with top notes of mandarin and red apple, leading to a heart of violet, offset by a leather accord. The base blends notes of amber, oakwood, vanilla and labdanum.Quantity: 90 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
